title: Man goes to jail after garam masala mistaken for heroin; MP High Court awards ₹10 lakh compensation
description: The Madhya Pradesh High Court recently awarded ₹10 lakh compensation to a businessman who spent 57 days in jail after airport security equipment wrongly flagged packets of branded Garam Masala and Aamchur powder as heroin and MDEA [Ajay Singh v. State of Madhya Pradesh & Ors.]Justice Deepak Khot held that the State was vicariously liable for the businessman’s illegal incarceration, which was a result of faulty forensic infrastructure and delays in chemical examination of the seized material.
